tracks.name: NICE KEED - WE ARE YOUR FRIENDS

transitions.notes: Adjacent keys on Camelot wheel - perfect for smooth beatmatched transition
2-semitone separation - use careful EQ assistance during blend
Adjacent keys - excellent transition, direct mix recommended

mixing_advice.overall_strategy: This is an excellent 4-track mix. Keys flow naturally around the Camelot wheel with strong compatibility.
mixing_advice.opening: Start with Track 0 (D Minor/10B) - solid foundation
mixing_advice.buildups: Transitions 0→1→2→3 create natural energy progression with minimal harmonic jarring
mixing_advice.energy_arc: Relatively flat energy (all upbeat electronic tracks) - consider adding ambient/downtempo track for dynamic contrast
mixing_advice.closing: End with Track 3 (E Minor/12B) or loop back to 0 for cyclic DJ set

recommendations.recommendation: Keys (10B, 9B, 11B, 12B) form a tight cluster on the wheel - excellent for flow but consider adding variety
recommendations.action: Add track in key like 5B (C Minor) or 1A (G Major) for contrast while maintaining compatibility

recommendations.recommendation: All tracks have similar energy levels (~128 BPM, electronic) - consider energy arc
recommendations.action: Introduce buildup/breakdown tracks to create dynamic tension and release
Stick with recommended durations for smooth listening experience

camelot_wheel_position.visualization: All tracks in minor (B) mode, positions 9-12 (compact cluster on northeast quadrant)

next_phase: Phase 3 will add spectral analysis to detect energy peaks, smart cue points, and intro/outro sections
